info.name: Swap ChangeHero - 全网络全类型（Quote+Build）
info.description:
ChangeHero 同链/跨链测试（询价+构建一体）。每条用例先 quote 再 build，并携带 quoteResultCtx。

同链支持网络：Tron、Solana、TON
跨链支持网络：Ethereum、BSC、Polygon、Avalanche、Arbitrum、Optimism、Solana、Near、DOGE、LTC、BCH、Base、Tron、TON、SUI、Aptos、BTC
provider：SwapChangeHero

当前 collection 为已验证成功集：Aptos 虽在声明支持清单内，但本轮实探未命中 provider，暂不写入成功路由。

item.name: Build+Quote - ChangeHero - 全网络全类型

function hs(obj){ return Object.keys(obj).map(function(k){ return { key: k, value: String(obj[k]) }; }); }

function q(obj){ return Object.keys(obj).filter(function(k){ return obj[k] !== undefined && obj[k] !== null; }).map(function(k){ return encodeURIComponent(k) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(String(obj[k])); }).join('&'); }
function providerName(x){ return (x && x.info && x.info.provider) || x.provider || ''; }
function providerCtx(x){ return (x && x.quoteResultCtx) || (x && x.info && x.info.quoteResultCtx) || null; }
function validTarget(data){ return (data || []).find(function(x){ return providerName(x) === PROVIDER && !x.errorMessage && providerCtx(x); }); }
function skipText(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); }

function providerMatches(actual, provider){ var name = skipText(actual).toLowerCase(); var base = skipText(provider).toLowerCase(); if (!name || !base) return false; var variants = [base]; if (base.indexOf('swap') === 0) variants.push(base.slice(4)); if (base.indexOf('oneinch') >= 0) variants.push('1inch'); if (base.indexOf('1inchfusion') >= 0) variants.push('fusion'); if (base.indexOf('exodusbridge') >= 0 || base.indexOf('exodus') >= 0) variants.push('exodus'); variants = variants.filter(Boolean); return variants.some(function(v){ return name === v || name.indexOf(v) >= 0; }); }
function skipProviderEntry(data, provider){ return (data || []).find(function(entry){ return providerMatches((entry && entry.info && entry.info.provider) || entry.provider || '', provider); }); }
function quoteEntryError(entry){ return skipText((entry && entry.errorMessage) || (entry && entry.info && entry.info.errorMessage) || ''); }

function skipIsTimeoutError(err){ var text = skipText(err && (err.message || err.reason || err)).toLowerCase(); return text.indexOf('timeout') >= 0 || text.indexOf('timed out') >= 0 || text.indexOf('超时') >= 0; }
function skipIsMessageSkippable(msg){ return ['Provider error', '渠道商异常', '报价不可用'].indexOf(skipText(msg)) >= 0; }

function markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, reason, detail){ var label = '[' + caseName + '] SKIP ' + provider + ' ' + reason + (detail ? ' | ' + detail : ''); pm.test(label, function(){ pm.expect(true).to.eql(true); }); console.warn(label); }

function handleQuoteTransportSkip(caseName, provider, err, status){ if (skipIsTimeoutError(err)) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote timeout', skipText(err && (err.message || err.reason || err))); return true; } var code = Number(status); if ([502, 503, 504].indexOf(code) >= 0) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote HTTP ' + code, 'upstream'); return true; } return false; }

function handleQuotePayloadSkip(caseName, provider, data, providerEntry, detail){ var arr = Array.isArray(data) ? data : []; if (!arr.length) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote empty data', detail || 'data=[]'); return true; } var entry = providerEntry || skipProviderEntry(arr, provider); if (entry && skipIsMessageSkippable(quoteEntryError(entry))) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote ' + quoteEntryError(entry), detail || ('provider=' + provider)); return true; } return false; }

url: BASE_URL + '/swap/v1/quote?' + q({ fromTokenAddress: c.fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress: c.toTokenAddress, fromTokenAmount: c.amount, fromNetworkId: c.fromNetworkId, toNetworkId: c.toNetworkId, protocol: 'Swap', userAddress: c.userAddress, slippagePercentage: '0.5', autoSlippage: 'true', receivingAddress: c.receivingAddress, kind: 'sell', toTokenAmount: '', denySingleSwapProvider: '' }),

if (err) { if (handleQuoteTransportSkip(c.name, PROVIDER, err)) { runCase(i + 1); return; } pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quote 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i + 1); return; }
if (handleQuoteTransportSkip(c.name, PROVIDER, null, res.code || res.status)) { runCase(i + 1); return; }
pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quote HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(res.code || res.status).to.equal(200); });
pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quote 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); });
var target = validTarget(data); if (handleQuotePayloadSkip(c.name, PROVIDER, data, target, 'providers=' + JSON.stringify(providers))) { runCase(i + 1); return; }
pm.test('[' + c.name + '] ChangeHero 有效报价', function(){
pm.expect(target.errorMessage, 'ChangeHero 条目携带 errorMessage: ' + target.errorMessage).to.be.oneOf([undefined, null, '']);
pm.expect(target.toAmount || target.fromAmount || (target.info && target.info.toAmount), 'ChangeHero 条目无有效报价金额').to.be.ok;
pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quoteResultCtx 存在', function(){ pm.expect(ctx, 'changeHeroQuote=' + JSON.stringify(target)).to.be.ok; });
if (err2) { pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err2.toString()); }); runCase(i + 1); return; }
pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(res2.code || res2.status).to.equal(200); });
pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(j2.code).to.eql(0); });
pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build data 存在', function(){ pm.expect(j2.data).to.be.ok; });
